# Rat

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Rat;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Rat { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

mouse, mice, gerbil, rodent, pet, pest, plague, disease

animals
